message:
test(readme): IoError variant triggers (CSV failure modes)

Sister to fd90.41 (TypeError variant triggers). IoError has 10+
variants for CSV/JSON/Parquet/Excel failure modes; the first 4 CSV
variants are mechanically triggerable but were never asserted on
the variant level — only round-trip happy paths were tested.

Adds readme_ioerror_variant_triggers — reachable via prelude alone —
that asserts:

- read_csv_str("")                              → IoError::MissingHeaders
- read_csv_with_options(valid, idx_col="absent")
                                                 → IoError::MissingIndexColumn("absent")
- read_csv_str("a,a,b\n...")                    → IoError::DuplicateColumnName("a")
- read_csv_with_options(valid, usecols=["ghost"])
                                                 → IoError::MissingUsecols(["ghost"])

Each matches! includes the inner field value (column name list,
single name) so a regression returning the right variant with the
wrong payload still fails.

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.42.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
